Description: User completes a first-time card payment successfully
Pre-Conditions: User is logged in / Item in basket / Valid Stripe test card available
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to checkout / 2. Tap Pay / 3. Enter valid card details in native payment sheet / 4. Confirm payment
Expected Result: Payment confirmation screen shown with order reference and amount / Confirmation email received within 60 seconds
Pass/Fail Criteria: PASS: Confirmation screen appears within 2 seconds / FAIL: Redirect to browser OR no confirmation shown

Description: Returning user pays with a previously saved card in one tap
Pre-Conditions: User is logged in / User has a saved card on file
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to checkout / 2. Verify saved card is shown as default / 3. Tap Confirm Payment
Expected Result: Payment confirmed within 2 seconds / No re-entry of card details required
Pass/Fail Criteria: PASS: Single tap completes payment / FAIL: User asked to re-enter card details

Description: User sees a clear message when card is declined
Pre-Conditions: User is logged in / Stripe test card for decline available (card ending 0002)
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to checkout / 2. Enter decline test card / 3. Attempt payment
Expected Result: Error message shown: 'Your card has insufficient funds. Please try a different card.' / Option to try another card shown
Pass/Fail Criteria: PASS: User-friendly decline reason shown / FAIL: Generic error or no message shown

Description: Expired card shows appropriate error message
Pre-Conditions: Stripe expired card test number available
Test Steps: 1. Enter expired test card / 2. Attempt payment
Expected Result: Error message: 'Your card has expired. Please update your card details.' shown
Pass/Fail Criteria: PASS: Expiry-specific message shown / FAIL: Generic error message

Description: 3DS challenge completes within app and payment succeeds
Test Steps: 1. Enter 3DS-required test card / 2. Initiate payment / 3. Complete 3DS authentication within the app modal
Expected Result: 3DS modal appears within app (no browser redirect) / After authentication payment completes / Confirmation screen shown
Pass/Fail Criteria: PASS: No browser redirect / 3DS completes in-app / FAIL: User redirected to browser

Description: User cancels 3DS authentication and is returned to checkout
Test Steps: 1. Enter 3DS-required test card / 2. Initiate payment / 3. Cancel 3DS authentication
Expected Result: User returned to checkout screen / No charge made / Clear message: 'Payment cancelled. Please try again.'
Pass/Fail Criteria: PASS: No charge / user back at checkout / FAIL: Payment processed despite cancellation

Description: Clear message shown when payment takes longer than 30 seconds
Pre-Conditions: Network throttling set to simulate slow connection
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to checkout / 2. Initiate payment on throttled connection / 3. Wait 30+ seconds
Expected Result: Timeout message shown: 'Payment is taking longer than expected. Please check your connection and try again.' / No duplicate charge on retry
Pass/Fail Criteria: PASS: Timeout message shown / no duplicate charge / FAIL: App hangs or duplicate charge

Description: User informed if connection drops mid-payment
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to checkout / 2. Initiate payment / 3. Disconnect network before response
Expected Result: Network error message shown / No charge applied / User can retry
Pass/Fail Criteria: PASS: No charge made / clear error shown / FAIL: Unknown state / double charge possible

Description: Tapping Pay twice does not create two charges
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to checkout / 2. Tap Pay button twice rapidly
Expected Result: Only one payment is processed / One confirmation shown / One transaction in order history
Pass/Fail Criteria: PASS: Single charge in Stripe / single order / FAIL: Two charges applied

Description: User can request a full refund from order history
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to Order History / 2. Select completed order / 3. Tap Request Refund / 4. Confirm
Expected Result: Refund confirmation shown / Email confirmation received / Stripe refund visible in test dashboard / Status updated in order history
Pass/Fail Criteria: PASS: Refund processed / email sent within 5 minutes / FAIL: Refund not processed or no confirmation

Description: Partial refund applied correctly when one item from multi-item order is returned
Test Steps: 1. Initiate return for one item / 2. Agent processes partial refund / 3. Check order history
Expected Result: Partial refund amount shown in order history / Full order not cancelled / Correct amount refunded
Pass/Fail Criteria: PASS: Correct partial amount refunded / FAIL: Wrong amount or full order refunded

Description: Card numbers never transmitted through PayFlow servers
Test Steps: 1. Initiate payment / 2. Monitor all network traffic from PayFlow app / 3. Inspect requests to PayFlow API
Expected Result: No card number, CVV or expiry appears in any PayFlow network request / All card data goes directly to Stripe
Pass/Fail Criteria: PASS: Zero card data in PayFlow requests / FAIL: Any card data visible in PayFlow traffic

Description: Confirmation email is sent within 60 seconds of payment
Pre-Conditions: Valid email address on test account
Expected Result: Confirmation email received within 60 seconds / Email contains order reference, amount, and estimated delivery
Pass/Fail Criteria: PASS: Email within 60 seconds with correct data / FAIL: Email delayed beyond 60 seconds or missing data

Description: All completed payments appear correctly in order history
Test Steps: 1. Complete 3 test payments / 2. Navigate to Order History
Expected Result: All 3 orders shown with correct amount, date, and status / Correct order references displayed
Pass/Fail Criteria: PASS: All payments accurately reflected / FAIL: Missing orders or incorrect amounts

Description: Payment flow works with iOS/Android accessibility enabled
Pre-Conditions: Accessibility screen reader enabled on test device
Test Steps: 1. Enable screen reader / 2. Navigate to checkout / 3. Attempt full payment flow
Expected Result: All payment UI elements readable by screen reader / Flow completable using screen reader alone
Pass/Fail Criteria: PASS: Full flow completable with accessibility / FAIL: Elements unlabelled or flow blocked
